testcase.name: showChatContextMenu() > does nothing gracefully when elements.chatContextMenu is null
showChatContextMenu() > sets style.left and style.top and makes the menu visible
showChatContextMenu() > adjusts position if menu overflows the right edge of the viewport
hideChatContextMenu() > does nothing gracefully when elements.chatContextMenu is null
hideChatContextMenu() > sets display to none
handleChatClick() > does nothing when chat is falsy
handleChatClick() > does nothing when chat.id is absent
handleChatClick() > calls browser.tabs.create with the reader URL for a valid chat
handleChatContextMenu() > calls event.preventDefault()
handleChatContextMenu() > sets contextMenuChat on state to the given chat
handleChatContextMenu() > renders review date "Set review date" when chat has no reviewDate and is not stale
handleChatContextMenu() > renders review date label when chat has a reviewDate
handleChatContextMenu() > renders stale warning when chat.flaggedAsStale with no reviewDate
handleChatContextMenu() > renders stale warning with reviewDate when flaggedAsStale
updateChatRatingWidget() > does nothing when no #chatRatingWidget element exists
updateChatRatingWidget() > marks stars up to the rating as active
updateChatRatingWidget() > sets aria-pressed correctly on each star button
updateChatRatingWidget() > clears all active stars when rating is 0
setupChatContextMenuActions() > does nothing when elements.chatContextMenu is null
setupChatContextMenuActions() > wires click handlers to [data-chat-action] items
setupChatContextMenuActions() > logs a warning when no chat is selected for an action
handleRateChatAction() > does nothing when contextMenuChat is null
handleRateChatAction() > sets rating when chat does not already have that rating
handleRateChatAction() > clears rating (sets to null) when the same value is clicked again
handleRateChatAction() > calls renderer.setChatData with the returned chats
handleChatSaved() > resets save button to default when user cancels from the assign dialog
handleChatSaved() > adds the chat to state.chats before showing dialog
handleChatSaved() > updates the chat and saves tree when dialog returns a result
handleChatSaved() > replaces stale duplicate chat in state.chats
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > rename: calls showRenameChat for the context chat
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > rename: updates chat when dialog returns a result
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > edit-tags: calls showEditTags
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > edit-tags: updates tags when dialog returns result
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > move: calls showMoveChat
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > move: moves chat and calls saveTree when dialog returns result
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > set-review-date: calls showSetReviewDate
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > set-review-date: updates reviewDate when dialog returns result
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > export: calls showExportChat
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > export: calls dialog.alert when showExportChat throws
testcase.system-err: [bAInder] [ERROR] Export chat failed: Error: Boom at C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/tests/chat-actions.test.js:637:67 at [90mfile:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/index.js:145:11 at [90mfile:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/index.js:915:26 at [90mfile:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/index.js:1243:20 at new Promise (<anonymous>) at runWithTimeout [90m(file:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/index.js:1209:10[90m)[39m at [90mfile:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/index.js:1653:37 at Traces.$ [90m(file:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4mvitest[24m/dist/chunks/traces.CCmnQaNT.js:142:27[90m)[39m at trace [90m(file:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4mvitest[24m/dist/chunks/test.B8ej_ZHS.js:239:21[90m)[39m at runTest [90m(file:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/index.js:1653:12[90m)[39m

testcase.name: private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > delete: removes chat from state immediately (optimistic UI)
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > delete: calls saveTree and removeChat after deferred timer when chat has a topicId
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > delete: undo button restores the chat to state (no topic)
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > delete: undo button restores a chat that belonged to a topic (covers topic.chatIds.push)
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > copy: copies chat to clipboard successfully
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > copy: shows error notification when clipboard result is not ok
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > copy: shows tooLarge notification when result.tooLarge is true
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > copy: shows error when chatRepo.loadFullByIds returns empty
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > copy: shows error when chatRepo.loadFullByIds rejects
testcase.system-err: [bAInder] [WARN] Copy: failed to load chat content Error: load fail at C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/tests/chat-actions.test.js:768:59 at [90mfile:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/index.js:145:11 at [90mfile:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/index.js:915:26 at [90mfile:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/index.js:1243:20 at new Promise (<anonymous>) at runWithTimeout [90m(file:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/index.js:1209:10[90m)[39m at [90mfile:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/index.js:1653:37 at Traces.$ [90m(file:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4mvitest[24m/dist/chunks/traces.CCmnQaNT.js:142:27[90m)[39m at trace [90m(file:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4mvitest[24m/dist/chunks/test.B8ej_ZHS.js:239:21[90m)[39m at runTest [90m(file:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/index.js:1653:12[90m)[39m

testcase.name: private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > unknown action: does not throw and logs a warning
handleChatSaved() — Feature d: duplicate title overwrite > shows confirm dialog when a different chat shares the same title
handleChatSaved() — Feature d: duplicate title overwrite > resets save button to default when overwrite is declined
handleChatSaved() — Feature d: duplicate title overwrite > removes duplicate and saves tree when overwrite is confirmed
handleChatSaved() — Feature d: duplicate title overwrite > matches title case-insensitively
handleChatSaved() — Feature d: duplicate title overwrite > does not show confirm dialog when chatEntry.id matches the found title
handleChatSaved() — Feature d: duplicate title overwrite > places overwritten chat in the duplicate's original topic (nested topic fix)
handleChatSaved() — Feature d: duplicate title overwrite > does not call moveChatToTopic when duplicate has no topicId
handleChatSaved() — Feature c: auto-export > does not call triggerAutoExport when autoExportEnabled is false
handleChatSaved() — Feature c: auto-export > increments chatsSinceLastAutoExport when threshold not reached
handleChatSaved() — Feature c: auto-export > calls triggerAutoExport and resets counter when threshold is reached
handleChatSaved() — Feature c: auto-export > uses default threshold of 10 when autoExportThreshold is absent
handleChatSaved() — Feature c: auto-export > does not throw when browser.storage.local.get rejects
testcase.system-err: [bAInder] [WARN] Auto-export check failed: Error: storage error at C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/tests/chat-actions.test.js:957:64 at [90mfile:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/index.js:915:20

testcase.name: checkAndTriggerAutoExport() > does not call triggerAutoExport when autoExportEnabled is false
checkAndTriggerAutoExport() > increments chatsSinceLastAutoExport when threshold not reached
checkAndTriggerAutoExport() > calls triggerAutoExport and resets counter when threshold is reached
checkAndTriggerAutoExport() > uses default threshold of 10 when autoExportThreshold is absent
checkAndTriggerAutoExport() > does not throw when browser.storage.local.get rejects
testcase.system-err: [bAInder] [WARN] Auto-export check failed: Error: storage error at C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/tests/chat-actions.test.js:1022:64 at [90mfile:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/index.js:915:20

testcase.name: checkAndTriggerAutoExport() > threshold 1: triggers on the very first save
handleOverwriteChatAction via setupChatContextMenuActions > does nothing when contextMenuChat is null
testcase.system-err: [bAInder] [WARN] No chat selected for action: overwrite

testcase.name: handleOverwriteChatAction via setupChatContextMenuActions > shows error notification when tabs.query throws
handleOverwriteChatAction via setupChatContextMenuActions > shows error when no active tab is found (tab.id is falsy)
handleOverwriteChatAction via setupChatContextMenuActions > shows error when tabs.query returns empty array (no tab)
handleOverwriteChatAction via setupChatContextMenuActions > shows error when tabs.sendMessage throws
handleOverwriteChatAction via setupChatContextMenuActions > shows extraction error when response.success is false (no custom error)
handleOverwriteChatAction via setupChatContextMenuActions > shows custom error when response.success is false and error is set
handleOverwriteChatAction via setupChatContextMenuActions > shows error when extractResponse has no data
handleOverwriteChatAction via setupChatContextMenuActions > shows error when chatData has messageCount 0 and no messages array
handleOverwriteChatAction via setupChatContextMenuActions > returns without updating when user cancels the confirm dialog
handleOverwriteChatAction via setupChatContextMenuActions > shows error when chatRepo.updateChat throws
testcase.system-err: [bAInder] [ERROR] Overwrite chat failed: Error: DB error at C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/tests/chat-actions.test.js:1223:50 at [90mfile:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/index.js:915:20

testcase.name: handleOverwriteChatAction via setupChatContextMenuActions > success path: updates renderer, calls renderTreeView, shows success toast
handleOverwriteChatAction via setupChatContextMenuActions > success: uses tab.url as fallback when chatData.url is empty
formatDate > returns empty string for null / undefined / empty
formatDate > returns a non-empty string for a valid ISO date
formatDate > returns the original string for an invalid date
escapeHtml > returns empty string for null / undefined
escapeHtml > escapes & < > "
escapeHtml > escapes ampersand
escapeHtml > leaves safe text unchanged
sourceLabel > maps chatgpt
sourceLabel > maps claude
sourceLabel > maps gemini
sourceLabel > maps copilot
sourceLabel > returns source string for unknown
sourceLabel > returns Unknown for empty / null
sourceLabel > returns Excerpt when isExcerpt is true
badgeClass > returns badge--chatgpt for chatgpt
badgeClass > returns badge--unknown for unknown source
badgeClass > returns badge--excerpt when isExcerpt is true regardless of source
applyInline > converts **bold** to <strong>
applyInline > converts *italic* to <em>
applyInline > converts `code` to <code>
applyInline > does not double-process bold inside code
applyInline > returns unchanged text when no formatting present
applyInline > handles empty string
applyInline > converts ![alt](https://url) to
applyInline > converts data: image URL to
applyInline > keeps & encoded in image src URL (valid HTML attribute)
applyInline > converts [text](url) to an anchor tag
applyInline > keeps & encoded in link href (valid HTML attribute)
applyInline > handles links alongside bold text
renderMarkdown > returns empty string for null / undefined / empty
renderMarkdown > strips YAML frontmatter
renderMarkdown > renders # heading as <h1>
renderMarkdown > renders ## heading as <h2>
renderMarkdown > renders ### heading as <h3>
renderMarkdown > renders --- as <hr>
renderMarkdown > renders fenced code block as a code-block widget with header and copy button
renderMarkdown > does not double-escape HTML inside code blocks
renderMarkdown > renders blockquote > as <blockquote>
renderMarkdown > renders standalone ![alt](url) as an
renderMarkdown > renders [text](url) link inside paragraph
renderMarkdown > auto-links a bare https URL
renderMarkdown > auto-links a bare http URL
renderMarkdown > does not double-link an explicit markdown link whose href is a URL
renderMarkdown > trims trailing period from auto-linked URL and keeps the period as text
renderMarkdown > trims trailing ) from auto-linked URL
renderMarkdown > auto-links URL with path and query string
renderMarkdown > does not link text that starts with http inside a word (e.g. no-op for plain text)
renderMarkdown > renders Microsoft Designer as a card (not iframe)
renderMarkdown > Designer card does not clobber surrounding text
renderMarkdown > audio marker with data: src renders <audio controls> player
renderMarkdown > audio marker with https: src renders <audio controls> player
renderMarkdown > audio marker with blob: src renders unavailable notice
renderMarkdown > audio marker without URL (not captured) renders unavailable notice
renderMarkdown > audio card does not clobber surrounding text
renderMarkdown > audio src URL is HTML-escaped in the output
renderMarkdown > standalone PDF filename renders as file-attachment-chip
renderMarkdown > chip includes session note text
renderMarkdown > without sourceUrl chip renders as <div>
renderMarkdown > with sourceUrl chip renders as <a> linking to the source
renderMarkdown > emoji-prefixed filename (from messagesToMarkdown) renders chip
renderMarkdown > emoji-prefixed filename in full serialised content renders chip inside assistant turn
renderMarkdown > sourceUrl is passed through to emoji-prefixed chip
renderMarkdown > filename + blank line + type label renders chip, drops bare type label
renderMarkdown > DOCX file renders chip with correct ext badge
renderMarkdown > CSV file renders chip with correct ext badge
renderMarkdown > Python file renders chip
renderMarkdown > filename embedded in prose is NOT rendered as chip
renderMarkdown > filename inside code block is NOT rendered as chip
renderMarkdown > chip does not clobber surrounding text
renderMarkdown > multiple attachment lines each render as separate chips
renderMarkdown > renders - list items as <ul>
renderMarkdown > renders numbered list items as <ol>
renderMarkdown > wraps plain text lines in
renderMarkdown > escapes HTML entities in plain text
renderMarkdown > applies inline formatting inside paragraphs
renderMarkdown > renders full messagesToMarkdown output correctly
renderMarkdown > renders === line as <hr> in a non-digest document
renderMarkdown > renders === line as chat-section-divider when isDigest option is true
renderMarkdown > detects digest mode from contentFormat frontmatter and renders section divider
processSources > returns early for null input

processSources > replaces a Sources

+

    pair with a .sources-trigger button

testcase.name: processSources > chip label uses plural "sources" for multiple links

processSources > does nothing when the

is not empty. and has no following

testcase.name:
processSources > does nothing to

elements that are not "Sources:"
processSources > does nothing when the <ul> has no links
testcase.system-out: [bAInder] processSources: Sources ul has no valid links

testcase.name: setupSourcesPanel > injects #sources-panel and #sources-overlay into the DOM
setupSourcesPanel > is idempotent — calling twice does not create a second panel
setupSourcesPanel > panel starts with aria-hidden="true"
setupSourcesPanel > clicking a .sources-trigger opens the panel and populates the list
setupSourcesPanel > close button hides the panel
setupSourcesPanel > Escape key closes an open panel
setupSourcesPanel > links in the panel open in a new tab
showError > shows the error state
showError > sets the error message text
renderChat > shows the reader header

testcase.name: renderChat > keeps entire assistant response in one .chat-turn--assistant when response contains internal --- rules
testcase.system-out:
[bAInder] [INFO] [reader] renderMarkdown: content length [33m224[39m | audio markers: [33m0[39m | lines with file extensions: [] [bAInder] [INFO] [reader] full content dump: "---
title: "HR Test"
source: chatgpt
contentFormat: markdown-v1
---

# HR Test

🙋 User question

---

🤖 First paragraph of response

---

Second paragraph of response

---

🙋 Second user question

---

🤖 Second response
"

Some text"

testcase.name: renderChat > meta-joined badge > overlay links use joined-section-N anchors
testcase.system-out:
[bAInder] [INFO] [reader] renderMarkdown: content length [33m132[39m | audio markers: [33m0[39m | lines with file extensions: [] [bAInder] [INFO] [reader] full content dump: "---
title: "Joined"
source: claude
contentFormat: digest-markdown-v1
---

## Section One

Content A

===

## Section Two

Content B
"

testcase.name: init > shows error when no chatId in URL
init > shows error when chatId not found in storage
init > renders the chat when chatId is found
testcase.system-out:
[bAInder] [INFO] [reader] renderMarkdown: content length [33m111[39m | audio markers: [33m0[39m | lines with file extensions: [] [bAInder] [INFO] [reader] full content dump: "---
title: "Found Chat Array"
source: copilot
contentFormat: markdown-v1
---

# Found Chat Array

Some content
"

testcase.name: init > header and content are shown, error is hidden, after successful render
testcase.system-out:
[bAInder] [INFO] [reader] renderMarkdown: content length [33m87[39m | audio markers: [33m0[39m | lines with file extensions: [] [bAInder] [INFO] [reader] full content dump: "---
title: "Render Test"
source: copilot
contentFormat: markdown-v1
---

# Render Test
"

testcase.name: init > error state is shown and header remains hidden when chat not found
init > shows error when chatId not in array
init > shows error when storage throws
setupRating > renders 5 star buttons
setupRating > marks stars up to currentRating as is-set
setupRating > shows no stars filled when rating is 0/null
setupRating > makes the container visible
setupRating > clicking a star saves the new rating to storage
setupRating > clicking the same star twice clears the rating
setupRating > is a no-op when #reader-rating element is absent
getScrollPositions > returns empty object when nothing stored
getScrollPositions > returns stored positions
getScrollPositions > returns empty object when localStorage contains invalid JSON
saveScrollPosition > persists a new position
saveScrollPosition > updates an existing position
saveScrollPosition > is a no-op when chatId is falsy
saveScrollPosition > evicts the oldest entry when cap is exceeded
saveScrollPosition > re-inserting an existing id moves it to the end (no eviction size change)
restoreScrollPosition > calls window.scrollTo with the stored Y value
restoreScrollPosition > does not call window.scrollTo when no position stored
restoreScrollPosition > is a no-op when chatId is falsy
setupReaderCopyButton > returns gracefully when button is absent
setupReaderCopyButton > success path: shows ✓ Copied feedback after click
setupReaderCopyButton > tooLarge path: skips clipboard write and shows error feedback
setupReaderCopyButton > fallback path: shows "Select all + paste" feedback
_findEntityBlock — attachment chips > finds a .file-attachment-chip by filename hint
_findEntityBlock — attachment chips > matching is case-insensitive
_findEntityBlock — attachment chips > returns null when filename does not match
_findEntityBlock — attachment chips > returns null when hint is null
_findEntityBlock — tables > finds a table by exact header hint (score 2)
_findEntityBlock — tables > matching is case-insensitive
_findEntityBlock — tables > falls back to partial header match (score 1) when not all cells match
_findEntityBlock — tables > returns null when no header cells match hint
_findEntityBlock — tables > returns null when table has no thead
_findEntityBlock — turn:self > returns the anchorEl itself for hint "turn:self"
_findEntityBlock — turn:self > is case-insensitive for the sentinel
_findEntityBlock — images > finds img.chat-image by exact alt text (score 2)
_findEntityBlock — images > matching is case-insensitive
_findEntityBlock — images > partial alt text match scores lower but still matches
_findEntityBlock — images > returns null when alt text does not match hint
_findEntityBlock — images > returns null when image has no alt text and hint is non-empty
countWords() > returns 0 for empty string
countWords() > returns 0 for null / undefined
countWords() > counts plain words correctly
countWords() > strips YAML frontmatter before counting
countWords() > strips fenced code blocks before counting
countWords() > strips inline code before counting
countWords() > strips markdown images before counting
countWords() > strips markdown links before counting
countWords() > handles whitespace-only text
countWords() > handles multi-line text without markdown
estimateReadTime() > returns 1 for 0 words (minimum)
estimateReadTime() > returns 1 for fewer than 200 words
estimateReadTime() > returns 1 for exactly 200 words
estimateReadTime() > rounds to nearest minute
estimateReadTime() > returns correct value for large word counts
deleteTurnsFromChat > returns null for a chat with no messages array
deleteTurnsFromChat > returns null when messages is not an array
deleteTurnsFromChat > returns an unchanged copy when turnIndices is empty
deleteTurnsFromChat > removes the specified turn by index
deleteTurnsFromChat > removes multiple turns (user + assistant)
deleteTurnsFromChat > updates messageCount to match the remaining messages
deleteTurnsFromChat > rebuilds content markdown reflecting the deleted turns
deleteTurnsFromChat > updated content contains correct messageCount in frontmatter
deleteTurnsFromChat > preserves title, source and url in the rebuilt content
deleteTurnsFromChat > can delete all turns, producing empty messages and frontmatter-only content
deleteTurnsFromChat > does not mutate the original chat object
deleteTurnsFromChat > removes entities whose messageIndex is in the deleted set
deleteTurnsFromChat > remaps messageIndex for surviving entities after deletion
deleteTurnsFromChat > removes entity type key entirely when all entities of that type are in deleted turns
deleteTurnsFromChat > handles multiple entity types simultaneously
deleteTurnsFromChat > does not add entity type keys that were not present on the original chat
setupTurnDeleteMode > adds a Select button to .reader-actions

[bAInder] [INFO] [reader] renderMarkdown: content length [33m152[39m | audio markers: [33m0[39m | lines with file extensions: [] [bAInder] [INFO] [reader] full content dump: "---
title: "T"
source: chatgpt
date: 2025-02-19T21:20:00.000Z
messageCount: 4
contentFormat: markdown-v1
---

🙋 Q1

---

🤖 A1

---

🙋 Q2

---

🤖 A2
"

testcase.name: _entityPresentInContent > CODE: returns true when code is still present
_entityPresentInContent > CODE: returns false when code has been deleted
_entityPresentInContent > CODE: returns true when entity has no code field
_entityPresentInContent > CITATION: returns true when URL is still present
_entityPresentInContent > CITATION: returns false when URL has been deleted
_entityPresentInContent > TABLE: returns true when first header is still present
_entityPresentInContent > TABLE: returns false when first header has been deleted
_entityPresentInContent > TABLE: returns true when headers array is empty
_entityPresentInContent > DIAGRAM: returns true when source prefix is present
_entityPresentInContent > DIAGRAM: returns false when source prefix has been deleted
_entityPresentInContent > ARTIFACT: always returns true (conservative)
_entityPresentInContent > IMAGE: always returns true (conservative)
_findMarkdownRange > returns exact range for plain text match
_findMarkdownRange > returns null when text is not present
_findMarkdownRange > finds a single unordered list item (user selects just the text)
_findMarkdownRange > finds multiple contiguous list items selected together
_findMarkdownRange > finds a heading line (user selects heading text without #)
_findMarkdownRange > finds an ordered list item
_findMarkdownRange > finds a blockquote line (user selects quote text without >)
_findMarkdownRange > removing matched range leaves the rest of the content intact
_findMarkdownRange > prefers exact match over line-based for plain prose
_findMarkdownRange > matches a line containing bold markers (**text**)
_findMarkdownRange > matches a line with inline code (`code`)
_findMarkdownRange > matches a GFM table header row with bold cells
_findMarkdownRange > matches a complete table (header + data rows) skipping the separator
_findMarkdownRange > removing a bold heading leaves surrounding content intact
deleteExcerptFromChat > returns null when messages array is absent
deleteExcerptFromChat > returns null when msgIndex is out of range
deleteExcerptFromChat > returns null when selectedText is empty
deleteExcerptFromChat > returns null when selectedText is not found in the message
deleteExcerptFromChat > removes the selected text from the target message
deleteExcerptFromChat > leaves other messages unchanged
deleteExcerptFromChat > does not change messageCount (turn still exists)
deleteExcerptFromChat > rebuilds chat.content reflecting the removed text
deleteExcerptFromChat > does not mutate the original chat object
deleteExcerptFromChat > removes only the first occurrence when text appears multiple times
deleteExcerptFromChat > removes code entity whose code block was deleted
deleteExcerptFromChat > keeps code entity when its code block was not deleted
deleteExcerptFromChat > updates prompt entity text and wordCount when user message is edited
deleteExcerptFromChat > removes prompt entity when edited message becomes empty
deleteExcerptFromChat > does not touch entities from other turns
deleteExcerptFromChat > removes citation entity when its URL was deleted
deleteExcerptFromChat > does not add phantom entity keys not present on original chat
setupAnnotations delete-text button > Delete button is hidden when chat has no messages

[bAInder] [INFO] [reader] renderMarkdown: content length [33m156[39m | audio markers: [33m0[39m | lines with file extensions: [] [bAInder] [INFO] [reader] full content dump: "---
title: "T"
source: chatgpt
date: 2025-02-19T21:20:00.000Z
messageCount: 2
contentFormat: markdown-v1
---

🙋 Hello world how are you

---

🤖 I am fine
"

testcase.name: _buildTopicList > returns empty array for null/undefined/empty treeObj
_buildTopicList > returns a flat list for root topics with no children
_buildTopicList > tracks depth for nested children
_buildTopicList > skips missing topic IDs gracefully
_buildTopicList > handles multiple root topics each with children
_showTopicPickerModal > returns a Promise
_showTopicPickerModal > appends the overlay to document.body
_showTopicPickerModal > close button (X) resolves with null
_showTopicPickerModal > cancel button resolves with null
_showTopicPickerModal > Escape key resolves with null
_showTopicPickerModal > clicking the overlay backdrop resolves with null
_showTopicPickerModal > overlay is removed from DOM after dismissal
_showTopicPickerModal > renders the title input field
_showTopicPickerModal > prefills title input with defaultTitle argument
_showTopicPickerModal > confirm with empty title does not resolve (validation)
_showTopicPickerModal > title input gets error class on empty submit
_showTopicPickerModal > error class removed when user types into title input
_showTopicPickerModal > has exactly 2 topic radio options
_showTopicPickerModal > does not render a "skip" / "no topic" radio
_showTopicPickerModal > defaults to "new" mode when no topics exist
_showTopicPickerModal > defaults to "existing" mode when topics exist
_showTopicPickerModal > "existing" radio is disabled when no topics exist
_showTopicPickerModal > "existing" radio is enabled when topics exist
_showTopicPickerModal > confirms "new" mode → resolves { title, mode: "new", topicName }
_showTopicPickerModal > confirm with "new" but empty topic name does not resolve (validation)
_showTopicPickerModal > confirms "existing" mode → resolves { title, mode: "existing", topicId }
_showTopicPickerModal > Enter key triggers confirm (new mode with valid inputs)
_showTopicPickerModal > radio change to "new" shows name input in body
_showTopicPickerModal > radio change to "existing" shows topic select in body
setupCreateMode — early returns > returns early when contentEl is absent
setupCreateMode — early returns > returns early when chatId is falsy
setupCreateMode — early returns > returns early when storage is falsy
setupCreateMode — early returns > returns early when messages array is empty
setupCreateMode — early returns > returns early when messages is not an array
setupCreateMode — early returns > returns early when .reader-actions is absent
setupCreateMode — buttons and initial state > appends a create button to .reader-actions
setupCreateMode — buttons and initial state > save and delete buttons are hidden initially
setupCreateMode — enter/exit toggle > clicking create button enters create mode (body gets create-mode class)
setupCreateMode — enter/exit toggle > entering create mode shows save button
setupCreateMode — enter/exit toggle > entering create mode sets turns to draggable
setupCreateMode — enter/exit toggle > create button label changes to "Cancel" in create mode
setupCreateMode — enter/exit toggle > clicking create button again exits create mode
setupCreateMode — enter/exit toggle > exiting create mode hides save button and restores title
setupCreateMode — enter/exit toggle > exiting create mode removes draggable from turns
setupCreateMode — turn selection > clicking a turn in create mode selects it
setupCreateMode — turn selection > clicking a selected turn deselects it
setupCreateMode — turn selection > clicking outside create mode does nothing
setupCreateMode — turn selection > clicking a button inside a turn does not select the turn
setupCreateMode — turn selection > delete button appears when a turn is selected
setupCreateMode — turn selection > delete button hides when selection is cleared
setupCreateMode — delete selected turns > delete button removes the selected turn from the DOM
setupCreateMode — delete selected turns > remaining turns are still present after delete
setupCreateMode — delete selected turns > selection is cleared and delete button hides after delete
setupCreateMode — drag-and-drop > dragstart outside create mode does nothing
setupCreateMode — drag-and-drop > dragstart in create mode marks turn as dragging and starts edge scroll
setupCreateMode — drag-and-drop > dragstart on non-turn element is ignored
setupCreateMode — drag-and-drop > dragover outside create mode does nothing
setupCreateMode — drag-and-drop > dragover with no drag source does nothing
setupCreateMode — drag-and-drop > dragover over the drag source itself is ignored
setupCreateMode — drag-and-drop > dragover valid target swaps turns in DOM
setupCreateMode — drag-and-drop > dragover the same target twice does not re-swap
setupCreateMode — drag-and-drop > dragover a new target when a pending swap exists cancels old swap first
setupCreateMode — drag-and-drop > drop commits the swap and stops edge scroll
setupCreateMode — drag-and-drop > dragend after committed drop cleans up dragging class and calls addOrdinalLabels
setupCreateMode — drag-and-drop > dragend without drop (cancelled drag) restores original order
setupCreateMode — drag-and-drop > document-level dragover updates _dragClientY while dragging
setupCreateMode — drag-and-drop > exitCreateMode during a mid-drag restores pending swap via _cancelPendingSwap
setupCreateMode — drag-and-drop > _stopEdgeScroll cancels the RAF when called via drop
setupCreateMode — save button flow > save button success path: persists new chat and shows saved label
setupCreateMode — save button flow > save button shows error label when storage.set throws
